description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Persons qualified as beneficiaries do not have any acquired right or claim. The claim decision process is described in [A.2.

.1.1.1.4 - Resilience Fund Processes And Principles](06aed112-2636-4478-b2c8-037808adc475), and the payout of a claim is subject to the approval of the Resilience Technical Committee (at their sole and absolute discretion) and further contingent on a SKY vote endorsing payment of the claim.
